name: /compliance-remove: refuses (exit 2) when compliance/controls.yaml still cites the framework being removed (preserve C-2 mapping integrity)
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro compliance && printf -- '- id: eu-ai-act
  name: EU AI Act
  url: https://eur-lex.europa.eu
  authoritative_publisher: EU
  jurisdiction: european-union
  applicable_to: [ai]
  identifier_scheme: eu-regulation
  why_authoritative: |
    a
    b
    c
  fetch_frequency: weekly
  legal_review_required: true
  paywalled: false
' > .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && printf -- '- framework: eu-ai-act
  control_id: Article-14
  satisfied_by: [hook]
  legal_review_status: pending
' > compliance/controls.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-remove.sh" eu-ai-act --catalog "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml" --controls-file "$PWD/compliance/controls.yaml"
